pull_request.title: [python] optimize resolving python versions on build image
pull_request.body: Use filesystem checks instead of subprocess calls to locate `uv` and `python` installed on the build image. Before After

commit_summaries.message:
Remove uv python list when running on vercel build image.

Signed-off-by: gscho <greg.c.schofield@gmail.com>

Prevent multiple subprocess calls to which to find uv.

Signed-off-by: gscho <greg.c.schofield@gmail.com>
Merge branch 'gscho/optimize-resolve-python-versions' of https://github.com/vercel/vercel into gscho/optimize-resolve-python-versions
